project.name: InfoScreen
project.purpose: A local kiosk dashboard for a Surface/Ubuntu display with schedule, market, weather, event stream, local events, photos, and runtime status.
project.secondary_host: macOS for Apple Calendar export only

document_contract.metadata_json: Root project requirements, constraints, plan, and current cleanup backlog.
document_contract.README.md: How to use, install, start, verify, and troubleshoot the project.
document_contract.docs/api-spec.md: HTTP endpoints, request/response behavior, and runtime JSON interactions.
document_contract.docs/questions.md: Implementation questions, mistakes found during this work, decisions, and resolution plan.

hard_constraints: Do not move or redefine runtime paths without verifying the running Surface host first.
Do not mix Mac schedule-sync changes with Surface frontend, crawler, systemd, or API changes.
Do not ask the Mac checkout to switch to a Surface feature branch for schedule sync.
Do not inject CSS, replace script URLs, or patch HTML from serve_infoscreen.py.
Do not keep duplicate checked-in CSS/JS in both surface/web/ and surface/web/assets/.
Do not remove or stop file logging as part of unrelated work.
Do not run destructive git cleanup on a deployed Surface host before backing up runtime files and logs.
Do not document guessed paths; include verification commands when a path may be environment-specific.
Do not silently fall back to fake data, old crawlers, or unverified sources.

target_repository_layout.deploy/: Systemd unit templates and install scripts only.
target_repository_layout.docs/: Only api-spec.md, design.md, and questions.md should remain under docs/.
target_repository_layout.mac/: macOS Apple Calendar export and schedule sync only.
target_repository_layout.scripts/: Developer, CI, status, and setup scripts.
target_repository_layout.surface/: Surface app implementation and runtime Python entrypoints.

active_features.name: HTTP dashboard server
active_features.status: implemented but needs cleanup to remove frontend patching responsibilities

active_features.name: Market and weather refresh
active_features.status: implemented; runtime path and docs must be kept consistent

active_features.name: Local official event discovery
active_features.status: implemented but output quality and frontend layout still require verification

cleanup_plan.description: Keep README.md, metadata.json, docs/api-spec.md, docs/design.md, and docs/questions.md as the active documentation set; remove other docs files.
Add and follow a runtime backup rule before any reset, clean, branch replacement, or file deletion on Surface.
Move/keep checked-in CSS and JS only under surface/web/assets/css and surface/web/assets/js; remove duplicate root and surface/web-level assets after verification.
Remove CSS injection, script URL replacement, and HTML patching from serve_infoscreen.py after source files are cleaned.
Ensure infoscreen-http.service writes append logs to surface/.env/logs/http.log and http.err.log.
Keep Mac schedule sync and Surface /schedule.json serving aligned to the verified target ~/infoscreen/schedule.json unless a separate migration changes it.
Ignore runtime files, logs, schedule.json, .env, pycache, and pyc files in a dedicated cleanup commit.

do_not_claim_until_verified: Local event extraction quality is fixed.
Mac and Surface branches are reconciled.
